snippet.title: Suez Canal | How will Blocked Ship get out? | Dhruv Rathee
snippet.description:
In the 150 year history of Suez Canal, it is the first time that a blockade like this has happened. Why did the Ever Given ship get stuck in the Suez Canal and what is being done to take it out? I explain all this in this video and the importance of Suez and Panama canals in the global trade today. I also explain why ship traffic is stuck behind the Suez Canal and they have a dilemma. Should they wait it out or should they take the route through the Cape of Good hope in South Africa.

localized.title: Suez Canal | How will Blocked Ship get out? | Dhruv Rathee
localized.description:
In the 150 year history of Suez Canal, it is the first time that a blockade like this has happened. Why did the Ever Given ship get stuck in the Suez Canal and what is being done to take it out? I explain all this in this video and the importance of Suez and Panama canals in the global trade today. I also explain why ship traffic is stuck behind the Suez Canal and they have a dilemma. Should they wait it out or should they take the route through the Cape of Good hope in South Africa.

snippet.title: Suez Canal: Tugboats sound horns as Ever Given container ship 'fully refloated'
snippet.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ► https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: Kutty Pattas Music Video | Ashwin | Reba John | Venki | Santhosh Dhayanidhi | Sandy
snippet.description:
A brilliantly vivid splash of colours and a wildly fun #KuttyPattas composed by the Raati fame #SanthoshDhayanidhi featuring the most exciting cast one could ask for! Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Watch it here and bring out the moves !

snippet.title: Throwing away my makeup products 😭😭
snippet.description:
Hey guys!!  Hope you're doing well!! In this video, You guys will see a casual day in our life!!  I cleaned one of our room and threw away most of my makeup, skincare products which are expired and not in a good condition! Even though its not in a good condition, I feed sad to throw them away 😭 Because of various reasons! There's much more fun in the video! Hope you guys enjoy the video ❤ Make sure you like share and subscribe if you enjoyed this video ❤

Wondering how to get soft, shiny and healthy hair? The Olive & Macadamia range from
Plum Goodness is a savior for all of us suffering from dry, dull and damaged hair.
I have found a perfect way to keep my hair healthy using products that are free from
toxic chemicals that are usually present in hair care products.
What are you waiting for? You definitely got to check this range out, I’m sure you guys
will love it as much as I did
Use my coupon code “coupon code to be shared by Plum” to avail 10% OFF on all Hair
care products on Plum’s website.
To buy the products shown in this video, you can go to
Website link: https://bit.ly/3lOxHEt

snippet.title: Suez Canal : సముద్రపు పోటు వచ్చినా కదలని ఆ నౌకను ఇలా దారికి తెచ్చారు | BBC News Telugu
snippet.description:
సూయజ్ కెనాల్‌లో  వారం రోజులుగా చిక్కుకుపోయి, రోజుకు 70 వేల కోట్ల రూపాయల నష్టంతో పాటుగా, అంతర్జాతీయ నౌకా వాణిజ్యంపై తీవ్ర ప్రభావం చూపిన ఈ ‘ఎవర్ గివెన్’ నౌక మొత్తానికి మళ్లీ నీటిలో తేలింది. ఇంతకీ ఇంత భారీ నౌకను ఎలా దారికి తెచ్చారంటే...
#SuezCanal  #Egypt #Evergiven 

___________
ఫేస్‌బుక్, ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్, ట్విటర్‌లలో బీబీసీ తెలుగును ఫాలో అవ్వండి. 

ఫేస్‌బుక్: https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsTelugu 

ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్: https://www.instagram.com/bbcnewstelugu/ 

ట్విటర్: https://twitter.com/bbcnewstelugu

snippet.title: Genius TRAVEL HACKS You Need to Know Before YOUR NEXT TRIP
snippet.description:
Unbelievable traveling tips and that will change your life
We gain a lot of experiences when we travel. We get to see new places, have fun and discover new things we’ve never seen before. But, we all know how stressful traveling can be, and today we’ve got the solution for you. We’ll show you some brilliant hacks and ideas that will make your adventures ten times easier. 
-         Rolling two suitcases at the same time can be very difficult, but you can connect them together with some cling film and carry them at the same time. 
-         If you can’t fit your jacket in your backpack, place it inside a garbage bag and vacuum seal it. When you remove all the air from the bag, it will get smaller.
-         Never keep all your money in one place; hide some of them in different places – like the inside of your hairbrush. 
 
Timestamps:
2:16 – How to pack your jewelry
3:56 – Turn a shoulder bag into a backpack
6:26 – Genius packing tips
8:52 – If you want to sleep on the plane, try this trick

-         Rolling two suitcases at the same time can be very difficult, but you can connect them together with some cling film and carry them at the same time. 
-         If you can’t fit your jacket in your backpack, place it inside a garbage bag and vacuum seal it. When you remove all the air from the bag, it will get smaller.
-         Never keep all your money in one place; hide some of them in different places – like the inside of your hairbrush. 
 
Timestamps:
2:16 – How to pack your jewelry
3:56 – Turn a shoulder bag into a backpack
6:26 – Genius packing tips
8:52 – If you want to sleep on the plane, try this trick

snippet.title: Spadikam 26th Year Special Video | Mohanlal | Thilakan | Bhadran | Linto Kurian
snippet.description:
Spadikam 26th year special video

Spadikam is a 1995 Indian Malayalam-language action drama film written and directed by Bhadran and produced by R. Mohan through Shogun Films. Dialogues were written by Rajendra Babu. The film stars Mohanlal and features Thilakan, Urvashi, Spadikam George, K. P. A. C. Lalitha, Rajan P. Dev, Silk Smitha, Nedumudi Venu, Chippy, and V. K. Sreeraman in supporting roles. S. P. Venkatesh composed the film's original songs and background score.

The film tells the story of Thomas Chacko (Mohanlal), who is known by the sobriquet Aadu Thoma, a young ruffian estranged from his narcissistic father, Chacko Mash (Thilakan), upon failing to meet the latter's high expectations. Spadikam received critical acclaim and was one of the highest-grossing Malayalam film of the year, grossing more than ₹5 crore at the box office. Mohanlal won the Kerala State Film Award for Best Actor, at the Filmfare Awards South, the film won Best Film – Malayalam, Best Actor (Mohanlal) and Best Director awards. The film was remade in Telugu, Tamil, and Kannada languages.

Softwares Used : Final Cut Pro X, After Effects
Edited by : Linto Kurian
Thumbnail Design : Abhishek P
Facebook : https://m.facebook.com/linto.kurian.54
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/linto_kurian/

snippet.title: Suez Canal Blocked : स्वेज नहर में फंसे विशालकाय जहाज़ ने पूरी दुनिया में तेल कैसे महंगा कर दिया?
snippet.description:
मिस्र की स्वेज़ नहर के आसपास उस समय कार्गो जहाज़ों की आवाजाही रुक गई, जब एक बड़ा कंटेनर जहाज़ नियंत्रण खोने के बाद वहाँ रेत में फँस गया. 400 मीटर लंबे (1312 फ़ीट) और 59 मीटर चौड़े जहाज़ एवर गिवेन को वहाँ से हटाने के लिए कई जहाज़ों को लगाया गया है, लेकिन आशंका जताई जा रही है ये जहाज़ वहाँ कई दिनों तक फँसा रह सकता है. ये घटना मंगलवार सुबह स्वेज़ बंदरगाह के उत्तर में हुई. ये जलमार्ग भूमध्यसागर को लाल सागर से जोड़ता है, जो एशिया और यूरोप के बीच सबसे छोटा समुद्री लिंक है. एवर गिवेन नाम का ये कंटेनर शिप पनामा में रजिस्टर है.

वीडियो: गुरप्रीत सैनी और दीपक जसरोटिया

#SuezCanal #SuezCanalBlocked #OilMarket

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

snippet.title: “അയാളുടെ Salary-യുടെ രണ്ട് ഇരട്ടിയാണ് ഞാൻ സമ്പാദിക്കുന്നത്!” | @Aami Ashokan | Josh Talks Malayalam
snippet.description:
കാസർഗോഡ് ജില്ലയിലെ നീലേശ്വരത്തെ ഒരു കൊച്ചുഗ്രാമത്തിൽ ജനിച്ചുവളർന്ന അഭിരാമി അശോക് യാദവ്, അഥവാ ആമി അശോകൻ ഒരു യൂട്യൂബറും ഇൻഫ്ളുവന്സറുമാണ്. സാമ്പത്തികമായി വളരെ പിന്നിലായിരുന്ന ആമിയുടെ കുടുംബം വളരെ കഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടാണ് കഴിഞ്ഞുകൂടിയത്. ഒരു തികഞ്ഞ മദ്യപാനിയായ ആമിയുടെ അച്ഛൻ ചെറുപ്പത്തിലെല്ലാം അമ്മയെ ഒരുപാട് ഉപദ്രവിക്കുമായിരുന്നു. ഇത് ദിവസവും കണ്ടുവളർന്ന ആമി നല്ലൊരു നാളെക്കായി ഒരുപാട് കൊതിച്ചിരുന്നു. അച്ഛന്റെ അപ്രതീക്ഷിതമായ നിര്യാണം ആമിയുടെ കുടുംബത്തെ ഒരുപാട് ബാധിച്ചു. മാനസികമായി തളർന്ന അമ്മയും, ജോലിയാകാത്ത ചേട്ടനും ഒക്കെയായി ബുദ്ധിമുട്ടിലൂടെ പോകുന്ന സമയത്താണ് ആമിയുടെ വിവാഹം നടക്കുന്നത്. എന്നാൽ പിന്നീട് ആ വിവാഹത്തിൽ നിന്ന് വേർപെട്ട് വരേണ്ടതുണ്ടായ സാഹചര്യം ആമിക്കുണ്ടായി. എന്നാൽ ചുറ്റുമുള്ള നാട്ടുകാർ അന്നുതൊട്ടേ പേരുകൾ വിളിക്കാൻ തുടങ്ങിയിരുന്നു. ടിക് ടോകിലൂടെ വിഡിയോകൾ ഉണ്ടാക്കി പോസ്റ്റ് ചെയ്യുമ്പോഴും ആമിക്ക് പല മോശമായ കമന്റുകൾ വരാറുണ്ടായിരുന്നു. എന്നാൽ അതൊന്നും വകവയ്ക്കാതെ കഠിനമായി അദ്ധ്വാനിച്ചുകൊണ്ടേയിരുന്നു. പിന്നീട് യൂട്യൂബിലേക്ക് കൂടുമാറിയ ആമിയുടെ വീഡിയോസ് പ്രേക്ഷകർക്ക് ഇഷ്ടപ്പെടാൻ തുടങ്ങി. തന്റെ വ്യക്തിജീവിതത്തെപ്പറ്റി വളരെ മോശമായി കമന്റ് ചെയ്യുന്നവർ ഇന്നും ഉണ്ടെങ്കിലും ആമി അശോകൻ ഇന്ന് ഒരു ലക്ഷത്തോളം ഉപജീവനം ലഭിക്കുന്ന ഒരു ഇൻഫ്ളുവൻസറും യൂട്യൂബറും ആണ്. ആമി അശോകൻ അന്ന് സ്വപ്നം കണ്ട നല്ല ദിവസങ്ങൾ ആണ് ഇന്നത്തെ ആമിയുടെ ജീവിതം. 

ജോഷ് Talks-ന്റെ ഈ എപ്പിസോഡ് നിങ്ങൾക്ക് സഹായകമായെങ്കിൽ ഉടൻ തന്നെ ലൈക്കും ഷെയറും ചെയ്യുക; നിങ്ങളുടെ അഭിപ്രായങ്ങൾ കമന്റ് ബോക്സിലൂടെ ഞങ്ങളെ അറിയിക്കൂ. എന്താണ് നിങ്ങളുടെ നല്ല നാളെയുക്കുറിച്ചുള്ള സ്വപ്‌നങ്ങൾ? ജോഷ് Talks-മായി പങ്കുവയ്ക്കൂ.

ആമി അശോകന്റെ യൂട്യൂബ് ചാനൽ ഇവിടെ കാണൂ:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCi1oMmvSnRvQQxybv9nLxiQ


Born in a small village in Neeleswaram in Kasaragod district, Abhirami Ashok Yadav or Aami Ashokan is a YouTuber and Influencer. Aami's family has been struggling financially. Aami's father was a perfect alcoholic and used to beat up her mother almost all the days. Seeing this every day, Aami Ashokan longed for a better tomorrow. Aami's family was devastated by her father's untimely death. Aami Ashokan's marriage comes at a time when she's going through a difficult time with her mentally exhausted mother and unemployed brother. But then Aami had to get a divorce from that marriage. But the locals around her started calling names by that time. Aami Ashokan kept getting bad comments while making and posting videos on Tik-Tok. But despite that, she continued to work hard. Aami's videos were later uploaded to YouTube and the audience started liking her. Although there are still people who comment very badly on her personal life, Aami Ashokan is an influencer and YouTuber who earns over a lakh rupees today. Today's Aami's life is the good days she dreamed of then.

If you found this episode of Josh Talks Malayalam helpful, please like and share it immediately; Let us know your comments via the comment box. What are your dreams for a better tomorrow? Share with Josh Talks Malayalam.

Watch Aami Ashokan's YouTube channel here:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCi1oMmvSnRvQQxybv9nLxiQ


Josh Talks passionately believes that a well-told story has the power to reshape attitudes, lives, and ultimately, the world. We are on a mission to find and showcase the best motivational stories from across India through documented videos and live events held all over the country. Josh Talks Malayalam caters to the Malayalam speaking audience worldwide. It aims to inspire and motivate Malayalees by showcasing Malayalam motivation through the experiences of fellow Malayalis. Josh talks Malayalam brings to you the best Malayalam motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women’s rights, public policy, sports, entertainment, and social initiatives. With 9 languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the setbacks they face in their career and helping them discover their true calling in life.

ജോഷ് Talks ഇന്ത്യയിലെ ഏറ്റവും പ്രേരണാത്മകമായ കഥകൾ ശേഖരിക്കുകയും അവയെ പങ്കുവെക്കാൻ ഒരു വേദി നൽകുകയും ചെയ്യുന്നു. വിവിധ പശ്ചാത്തലങ്ങളിൽ നിന്നുള്ള അനുഭവസ്ഥർ അവരുടെ സംഘർഷഭരിത കഥകൾ പങ്കുവയ്ക്കുന്നു. ഒരു സമ്മേളനമായി തുടങ്ങിയ ജോഷ് Talks, നിലവിൽ 9 ഭാഷകളിൽ കഥകൾ പങ്കുവയ്ക്കുന്നു. ഊർജ്ജസ്വലരായ യുവജനങ്ങളുടെ കഴിവുകളെ പ്രോത്സാഹിപ്പിക്കുകയും, അവരുടെ ജീവിതത്തിൽ അവർ നേരിടുന്ന തിരിച്ചടികൾ മറികടക്കാൻ അവർക്ക് പ്രചോദനം നൽകുകയും ചെയ്യുക എന്നതാണ് ഞങ്ങളുടെ ലക്ഷ്യം.

localized.title: “അയാളുടെ Salary-യുടെ രണ്ട് ഇരട്ടിയാണ് ഞാൻ സമ്പാദിക്കുന്നത്!” | @Aami Ashokan | Josh Talks Malayalam
localized.description:
കാസർഗോഡ് ജില്ലയിലെ നീലേശ്വരത്തെ ഒരു കൊച്ചുഗ്രാമത്തിൽ ജനിച്ചുവളർന്ന അഭിരാമി അശോക് യാദവ്, അഥവാ ആമി അശോകൻ ഒരു യൂട്യൂബറും ഇൻഫ്ളുവന്സറുമാണ്. സാമ്പത്തികമായി വളരെ പിന്നിലായിരുന്ന ആമിയുടെ കുടുംബം വളരെ കഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടാണ് കഴിഞ്ഞുകൂടിയത്. ഒരു തികഞ്ഞ മദ്യപാനിയായ ആമിയുടെ അച്ഛൻ ചെറുപ്പത്തിലെല്ലാം അമ്മയെ ഒരുപാട് ഉപദ്രവിക്കുമായിരുന്നു. ഇത് ദിവസവും കണ്ടുവളർന്ന ആമി നല്ലൊരു നാളെക്കായി ഒരുപാട് കൊതിച്ചിരുന്നു. അച്ഛന്റെ അപ്രതീക്ഷിതമായ നിര്യാണം ആമിയുടെ കുടുംബത്തെ ഒരുപാട് ബാധിച്ചു. മാനസികമായി തളർന്ന അമ്മയും, ജോലിയാകാത്ത ചേട്ടനും ഒക്കെയായി ബുദ്ധിമുട്ടിലൂടെ പോകുന്ന സമയത്താണ് ആമിയുടെ വിവാഹം നടക്കുന്നത്. എന്നാൽ പിന്നീട് ആ വിവാഹത്തിൽ നിന്ന് വേർപെട്ട് വരേണ്ടതുണ്ടായ സാഹചര്യം ആമിക്കുണ്ടായി. എന്നാൽ ചുറ്റുമുള്ള നാട്ടുകാർ അന്നുതൊട്ടേ പേരുകൾ വിളിക്കാൻ തുടങ്ങിയിരുന്നു. ടിക് ടോകിലൂടെ വിഡിയോകൾ ഉണ്ടാക്കി പോസ്റ്റ് ചെയ്യുമ്പോഴും ആമിക്ക് പല മോശമായ കമന്റുകൾ വരാറുണ്ടായിരുന്നു. എന്നാൽ അതൊന്നും വകവയ്ക്കാതെ കഠിനമായി അദ്ധ്വാനിച്ചുകൊണ്ടേയിരുന്നു. പിന്നീട് യൂട്യൂബിലേക്ക് കൂടുമാറിയ ആമിയുടെ വീഡിയോസ് പ്രേക്ഷകർക്ക് ഇഷ്ടപ്പെടാൻ തുടങ്ങി. തന്റെ വ്യക്തിജീവിതത്തെപ്പറ്റി വളരെ മോശമായി കമന്റ് ചെയ്യുന്നവർ ഇന്നും ഉണ്ടെങ്കിലും ആമി അശോകൻ ഇന്ന് ഒരു ലക്ഷത്തോളം ഉപജീവനം ലഭിക്കുന്ന ഒരു ഇൻഫ്ളുവൻസറും യൂട്യൂബറും ആണ്. ആമി അശോകൻ അന്ന് സ്വപ്നം കണ്ട നല്ല ദിവസങ്ങൾ ആണ് ഇന്നത്തെ ആമിയുടെ ജീവിതം. 

ജോഷ് Talks-ന്റെ ഈ എപ്പിസോഡ് നിങ്ങൾക്ക് സഹായകമായെങ്കിൽ ഉടൻ തന്നെ ലൈക്കും ഷെയറും ചെയ്യുക; നിങ്ങളുടെ അഭിപ്രായങ്ങൾ കമന്റ് ബോക്സിലൂടെ ഞങ്ങളെ അറിയിക്കൂ. എന്താണ് നിങ്ങളുടെ നല്ല നാളെയുക്കുറിച്ചുള്ള സ്വപ്‌നങ്ങൾ? ജോഷ് Talks-മായി പങ്കുവയ്ക്കൂ.

ആമി അശോകന്റെ യൂട്യൂബ് ചാനൽ ഇവിടെ കാണൂ:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCi1oMmvSnRvQQxybv9nLxiQ


Born in a small village in Neeleswaram in Kasaragod district, Abhirami Ashok Yadav or Aami Ashokan is a YouTuber and Influencer. Aami's family has been struggling financially. Aami's father was a perfect alcoholic and used to beat up her mother almost all the days. Seeing this every day, Aami Ashokan longed for a better tomorrow. Aami's family was devastated by her father's untimely death. Aami Ashokan's marriage comes at a time when she's going through a difficult time with her mentally exhausted mother and unemployed brother. But then Aami had to get a divorce from that marriage. But the locals around her started calling names by that time. Aami Ashokan kept getting bad comments while making and posting videos on Tik-Tok. But despite that, she continued to work hard. Aami's videos were later uploaded to YouTube and the audience started liking her. Although there are still people who comment very badly on her personal life, Aami Ashokan is an influencer and YouTuber who earns over a lakh rupees today. Today's Aami's life is the good days she dreamed of then.

If you found this episode of Josh Talks Malayalam helpful, please like and share it immediately; Let us know your comments via the comment box. What are your dreams for a better tomorrow? Share with Josh Talks Malayalam.

Watch Aami Ashokan's YouTube channel here:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCi1oMmvSnRvQQxybv9nLxiQ


Josh Talks passionately believes that a well-told story has the power to reshape attitudes, lives, and ultimately, the world. We are on a mission to find and showcase the best motivational stories from across India through documented videos and live events held all over the country. Josh Talks Malayalam caters to the Malayalam speaking audience worldwide. It aims to inspire and motivate Malayalees by showcasing Malayalam motivation through the experiences of fellow Malayalis. Josh talks Malayalam brings to you the best Malayalam motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women’s rights, public policy, sports, entertainment, and social initiatives. With 9 languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the setbacks they face in their career and helping them discover their true calling in life.

ജോഷ് Talks ഇന്ത്യയിലെ ഏറ്റവും പ്രേരണാത്മകമായ കഥകൾ ശേഖരിക്കുകയും അവയെ പങ്കുവെക്കാൻ ഒരു വേദി നൽകുകയും ചെയ്യുന്നു. വിവിധ പശ്ചാത്തലങ്ങളിൽ നിന്നുള്ള അനുഭവസ്ഥർ അവരുടെ സംഘർഷഭരിത കഥകൾ പങ്കുവയ്ക്കുന്നു. ഒരു സമ്മേളനമായി തുടങ്ങിയ ജോഷ് Talks, നിലവിൽ 9 ഭാഷകളിൽ കഥകൾ പങ്കുവയ്ക്കുന്നു. ഊർജ്ജസ്വലരായ യുവജനങ്ങളുടെ കഴിവുകളെ പ്രോത്സാഹിപ്പിക്കുകയും, അവരുടെ ജീവിതത്തിൽ അവർ നേരിടുന്ന തിരിച്ചടികൾ മറികടക്കാൻ അവർക്ക് പ്രചോദനം നൽകുകയും ചെയ്യുക എന്നതാണ് ഞങ്ങളുടെ ലക്ഷ്യം.

About Super Dancer 4 : 
---------------------------------------------------
Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. Spearheaded by Bollywood actress Shilpa Shetty, renowned choreographer Geeta Kapoor and Bollywood Director Anurag Basu, the show looks for 'Dance ka Kal'. After nationwide auditions, the judges select 12 children who are extraordinary dancers, aged between 4 to 13. These 12 dancers are paired with popular and able choreographers, the Super Gurus. Along with their Gurus, the kids compete to become Super Dancer - Dance Ka Kal.

en-IN.description:

Episode 3132: Taarak helps Jethalal
---------------------------------------------------------
Taarak offers to help Jethalal in lifting the cylinder. Jethalal and Taarak together lift the cylinder and take it to Babita's house. While taking that cylinder to Babita's house, Taarak and Jethalal have an argument between them. Afterward, Jethalal fits the cylinder to the stove. Iyer comes to his house and is shocked after seeing Jethalal over there. Watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: नरम दही वड़ा कैसे बनाते है | Dahi Vada Recipe | Holi Recipe | Dahi Bhalla Recipe | Kabitaskitchen
snippet.description:
#DahiVadaByKabita #HoliSoecialRecipe #KabitasKitchen

Ingredients:
For Vada :
Moong dal (soaked) - 1 cup
Urad dal (soaked)- 1/2 cup
Ginger -2 inch
Green chilli-1
Coriander leaves 
Salt 
Asafoetida -1/4 tsp 
Cooking oil to fry

For Green chutney :
Mint leaves - 1/4 cup
Garlic cloves - 4
Green chillies - 2
Coriander leaves -1/4 cup
Salt to taste

For tamarind chutney:
Tamarind pulp- 1/2 cup
Red chilli powder -1 tsp
Sugar- 2 tbsp
Salt - 1 tsp
water

For Dahi Vada Decoration :
Curd - 1 cup
Salt - 1/2 tsp
Sugar - 1 tsp
Water - 1/4 cup
Cumin powder
Salt
Chat masala
Green chutney
Tamarind chutney
Red chilli
coriander leaves 

Dahi vada recipe, नरम दही वड़ा कैसे बनाते है, how to make dahi vada, how to make dahi bhalla, kabitaskitchen, dahi vada recipe by kabita, easy dahi vada, best dahi vada recipe, holi special recipe, step by step dahi vada recipe, daho vada chutney recipe

Thank you for watching :)

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Ep. 1205 | Soumya Returns Home
snippet.description:
Soumya returns home after a long time, but Preeto confronts her and inquires the reason for her return. However, Harak tries to convince Preeto to have a change of heart and invite her in. Will Preeto soften her stance and welcome Soumya?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26Kt-V0yTlZzY3RFB0Equyf1h

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

Nazran churaundi firre bde chirr di..

litteran wale da dhol base maardai..

Kaatal adaavan kudi gun wargi..
Kardi glow firre chann wargi..
Kaatal adaavan kudi gun wargi
Oye Kardi glow firre chann wargi
Hona ae halaak ajj Road Romeo.. (2)
Tenu takk takk ke jo Race maardai..
“Kalla hi ni maan c palazzo sohniyei ni jhanjheran na duggni grace maardai,,
Pehlan hi ni maan c palazzo sohniyei  ni jhanjheran na duggni grace maardai”

Vaal chadde hoye ne loose paya suit tang ni.. 
Gajre tere da tere jeha rang ni.. (2)
Sone te suhaga nakhre te sang ni..
Krda ae kill tera ang ang ni.. 
Thukk teri sohniye donali wargi..
Rohb tera raund jinni thes maardai..
Kalla hi maan c palazzo...

Ho Gaaneyan di list Banayi firdi..
Hathan utte mehndi kudi laaayi firdi.. 
Tikka forehead te sajayi firdi..
Nazran churaundi firre bde chirr di..
Mere sun di aa gaane kal di repeat te
Sune Shivjot kal di repeat te..
O kudi pa ke palazzo nache..
Pa ke palazzo nache desi beat te..
Pa ke Sharara nache Desi beat te
O pa ke palazzo nache desi beat te..

Gore mukh utte aenkan ne kaliyan..
Golden kanna vich payiyan Waliyan.. (2)
Jutti tilledar kade heelan pa liyan..
Ni Munde ki tu kudiyan v piche la liyan..
Gaave jdo Billa Nachdi ae duniya..
litteran wale da dhol base maardai..
Kalla hi ni maan c palazzo sohniyei ni jhanjhera na duggni grace maardai..

snippet.title: Suez Canal : ఈ నౌకను దారికి తెచ్చే విధానాల్లో, మూడో ప్రత్యామ్నాయం అత్యంత ప్రమాదకరం | BBC News Telugu
snippet.description:
సూయజ్ కాలువలో అడ్డంగా ఇరుక్కుపోయిన ఈ భారీ నౌకను వెలికితీయడానికి మూడు విధానాలున్నాయి. మొదటి రెండు ప్రయత్నాల్లో ఫలితం రాకపోతే, మూడోది అమలు చేస్తారు. కానీ ఈ విధానంలో ఏమాత్రం అజాగ్రత్తగా ఉన్నా ఈ భారీ నౌక ముక్కలైపోయే ప్రమాదముందని నిపుణులు హెచ్చరిస్తున్నారు.
#SuezCanalBlockade  #EverGiven #EverGreen #Maritime 

___________
ఫేస్‌బుక్, ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్, ట్విటర్‌లలో బీబీసీ తెలుగును ఫాలో అవ్వండి. 

ఫేస్‌బుక్: https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsTelugu 

ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్: https://www.instagram.com/bbcnewstelugu/ 

ట్విటర్: https://twitter.com/bbcnewstelugu

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता का उल्टा चशमाह - Episode 762 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Gokuldham Ki Holi |  Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | Holi Special | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

snippet.title: Aaj Sajeya | Alaya F | Goldie Sohel | Punit M | Trending Wedding Song 2021 | Dharma 2.0
snippet.description:
The wedding song of the year is here! 
Watch out for the coolest bride Alaya F along with Taha Shah Badussha in the latest Saregama Original song "Aaj Sajeya"! The song has been composed, written, and sung by Goldie Sohel. This beautiful video has been directed by Punit Malhotra and produced by Dharma 2.0.

Song Credits:
Audio:
Singer, Music Composer and Lyricist: Goldie Sohel 


Music Producer - Manash  Borthakur
Additional Music Produced by - Goldie Sohel 
Arranged by - Manash  Borthakur, Ishan Das & Goldie Sohel.
Sound Design - Manash Borthakur 
Mixing and Mastering  - Pankaj Borah @Neo Sound 
Mix Assistant- Pranjal Borah 

Musician - 
Guitars - Ishan Das 
Sarangi - Dilshad Khan 
Mandolin and Charango - Tapas Roy 
Dholak - Raju Sardar,Gagan Sohel & Surendra 
Duff - Raju Sardar 
Shehnai - Yogesh More 
Bass - Abhinav Bora 

Vocals and all Instruments recorded by Pranjal Borah @Neo Sound. 
Special Thanks to Tarsame Mittal & Alaap Gosher. 
Goldie Sohel exclusively managed by TM Talent Management.

Video Credits: Cast: Alaya F & Taha Shah Badussh
Produced by: Dharma 2.0 
Producer: Garima Vohra 
Executive Producer: Samira Bandyopadhyay
Director: Punit Malhotra 
DOP: Manush Nandan 
Production Designer: Durgaprasad Mahapatra
Choreographer : PavanBob
Choreographer Assitant - Ali , Kajal
Editor
Costumes for Alaya: Manish Malhotra 
Make up for Alaya: Mickey Contractor 
Costume Stylist: Samidha Wangoo & team, Ratna Dhanda   (Dress Anatomy)
Editor: Nilesh Giridhar
Post Producer: Irfan Khan

#AajSajeya​ 
#TrendingWeddingSong2021
#SaregamaMusic

Lyrics: 

Aaj sajeya ae ve 
Saara seher 
Aaj hogayi aa ve 
Rab di meher 

Hayeee..

Aaj sajeya ae ve 
Saara seher 
Aaj hogayi aa ve 
Rab di meher 

Aakhiyan cho digde haanju 
Khusiyaan de 
Teri Ban jaana aaj toh saajna ve 

Aakhiyan cho digde haanju 
Khusiyaan de 
Teri Ban jaana aaj toh saajna ve ..

Khushiyaan da chadeya aaj 
Vela ve, Saareyaan ne 
Nachana Saareaya ne
Gauna ve... 

Khushiyaan da chadeya aaj 
Vela ve, Saareyaan ne 
Nachana Saareaya ne
Gauna ve... 

Sakhiyaan ne sajna ae
Main vi savarna ae
Aaj din chadeya 
Tere naam da ve 

Dil nahio lagda ae ve 
Aake tu leja ve main
Tere intezar che 
Tak diyaan raahan...

Aakhiyan cho digde haanju 
Khusiyaan de 
Teri Ban jaana aaj toh saajna ve ..

Khushiyaan da chadeya aaj 
Vela ve, Saareyaan ne 
Nachana Saareaya ne
Gauna ve... 

Khushiyaan da chadeya aaj 
Vela ve, Saareyaan ne 
Nachana Saareaya ne
Gauna ve...

With hospitals running out of beds, the atmosphere threatens to get violent. The Dean must step up and find a solution 🦠
As we track back a few months, semester exams are back. However, our students aren’t as prepared as they thought they were 😲

Unacademy presents Operation MBBS 2.
#DiceOperationMBBS2 #AyushMehra #AnshulChauhan #SarahHashmi

Get exam-ready with Unacademy’s weekly Mock Tests, doubt-clearing sessions, revision marathons and detailed performance analysis and feedback by India’s Top Educators. Download the Unacademy Learning App here: https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/67950194

snippet.title: New Punjabi Songs 2021 | Listen Bro | Khan Bhaini | Gal Sun Makhna | PenduBoyz | Latest Punjabi Song
snippet.description:
Khan Bhaini is here with his tune which is gonna make you move and groove, with the music of Pendu Boyz and direction of Sukh Sanghera presenting you the tune made just for the masters of Swag "LISTEN BRO"

Singer/Lyrics/Composer : Khan Bhaini
Music : Pendu Boyz
Director : Sukh Sanghera
DOP : Sam Malhi
Colorist : Prashant B Dhotre
Editor : GS Bhari
Project By : Teji Dhaliwal
Mix Master : BPM Singh
Instagram Reels Promotion : Boss Music Productions
Video : 10ZMA1 UK 
Online Promotion : Bull 18
Production : Mandeeo Hundal
Editor : GS Bhari
Project Manage by : Scope Entertainments
Special Thanks : Deewan Saab
Produces by : GS Sandhu & AS Mac

♫ Full Song Available On ♫
Itunes : https://geo.itunes.apple.com/at/album/id1559004021?at=1l3v9Tx&app=ituness
Spotify : http://open.spotify.com/album/29Zgv9hfGmcCqzal7exErd
Wynk :  https://wynk.in/u/mx36LfbrS
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/listen-bro-single/1559004021
Hungama : https://www.hungama.com/album/listen-bro/63950997/
Youtube Music : https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=tdVsnUP54yM&feature=share
Amazon Music : https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08ZDDJR4P?trackAsin=B08ZDH19W7&ref=dm_sh_IB6pJm4fcALcHITy2eFxDs10d
Resso : https://m.resso.app/ZSJ221Lud/
Gaana : https://gaana.com/song/listen-bro
Jio Savan : https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/listen-bro/RFs6BQBdTWE
Wynk: https://wynk.in/u/gISB9f9kw
———————————————————————————————
Operator Codes:
Ho Lokan Da Tan Kam Hunda
VI  Subscribers for Caller Tune Direct Dial 53712401236
BSNL - North  for Caller Tune Direct Dial 567007486707
BSNL - West  for Caller Tune Direct Dial 567007486707
Jio users, Download the Jio Saavn App to set this song as your Caller Tune
Airtel users, Download the Wynk Music App to set this song as your Caller Tune

Ho Gallan Vicho Kadeyan Main Tarak
VI Subscribers for Caller Tune Direct Dial 53712401235
BSNL - North  for Caller Tune Direct Dial 567007486709
BSNL - West  for Caller Tune Direct Dial 567007486709

Ho Likhn Ale Di Kadon
VI Subscribers for Caller Tune Direct Dial 53712401237
BSNL - North  for Caller Tune Direct Dial 567007486708
BSNL - West  for Caller Tune Direct Dial 567007486708

———————————————————————————————
Connect with Gringo Entertainments
SUBSCRIBE- https://www.youtube.com/gringoentertainmentsofficial
LIKE US-  https://www.facebook.com/gringoentertainment
INSTAGRAM- https://www.instagram.com/gringoentertainments
LINKEDIN - https://www.linkedin.com/in/gringo-entertainment-951186195/
TWITTER- https://twitter.com/GringoEntertain
WEBSITE-  https://www.gringoentertainments.com

Lyrics
Ho lokan da tan kam hunda 
Khichniyan lattan jaat apnia sochan nu azaad rakhda
Kehda banda kithe tak karda stand time das dinda time ni lihaj rakhda,
Kam te kalam utte rakheya bharosa khan bhaini wala chez ki a lokan nu a dasna
Gal Sun Makhna , 
Ho Gal sun Makhna Jehra Painda Rakhna , Hove j Mukadran Da time chakna..
Chup nu taka k chaki firde kai feelingan 3-4 Bandeyan da veham chakna Hooooo

Ho gallan vicho kadeyan main tarak bada 
Pali baithe dilan vich harakh bada
Sochde a sale kar jaan gay cross
Hunda ghode te kateedan vich farak bada
Dogle kahaunde jehde karde kharabi a
Pith na takaiye roti jihna nal khadi a
Ho chokan nal hunde ni start mitra ginne chune yaran kol mitran di chabi aa
Hauli Hauli sikhlangay udana v kaka kehnde jamde tan panchi v udaar ni hunde
Haske j kehnde kive o star saab hater hunde a sale yaar ni hunde
Chad de nu dekh jaa k mari de ni chitte aise fame da ki fayda paije thuk k j chatna
Gal sun Makhna...

Ho likhan ale di kadon kadar pai
Geetan vich kali kali sadar pai 
Pith piche kehnde sala vaada geetkar kal ud di hoi kana vich khabar pai
Matlab kad banda gallon j nahi lahi da
Apna bnaun de lai kise da dhai da
Settle hoiye ja na bhavein hoiye mitra 
Pehlan vere bande da stand hona chahida
Bohta v dimag utte pai da ni zor gaane jine k likhe a ohi gaye jaan gay
Kala kala karna release mitra par pehlan bebe bapu nu sunaye jaan gay
Apne valon tan pure likha tun tun change maade ch farak par lokan ne a dasna 
Gal sun Makhna..

 #listenbro #khanbhaini =#latestpunjabisong2021 #newpunjabisongs2021 #listenbronewsong2021 #latestpunjabisong #Newpunjabisong  #song2021 #newpunjabisong #newpunjabi #latestpunjabisong  #newsong2021 #song2021 #newsong  #ListenBro #GringoEntertainments #Song2021

snippet.title: Bepanah Pyaar (Official Video) Payal Dev, Yasser Desai | Surbhi Chandna, Sharad Malhotra | Shabbir A
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you Bepanah Pyaar composed and sung by Payal Dev collaborating up with the talented singer Yasser Desai for the first time. Reuniting after their successful pairing together in Naagin 5, Surbhi Chandna & Sharad Malhotra’s sizzling chemistry is sure make you fall in love with them all over again. snippet.title: Shabe Barat Kalam - Jaga Ji Lagane ki Dunya Nahi Hai - Hafiz Tahir Qadri 2021
snippet.description:
This video specially published on the blessed occasion of Shabe Baraat.

This video is sponsored by Bin Hashim Pharmacy & Supermarket.
For details please visit : https://binhashimonline.pk/
Facebook page : https://www.facebook.com/binhashim.supermarket/

Artist: Hafiz Tahir Qadri
Audio : @R W D S 
Video: @Ajwa Production 
Edit by : Qazi Shaheer

Lyrics:

Tu Khushi ky phul ly gaa kb talak
Tu yahan zinda rhy gaa kb talak
1 din mRNA ha akhir moot ha
KR ly Jo krna hai akhir moot ha

Jagaji lagany ki duniya nahi ha
Ya ibrat ki jaan ha tamasha nahi ha

Jahan main hai ibrat ky har su namuny 
Magar tujh ko andha kia raang o buu ny...
Kbhi gour sy ye bhi dakha ha tu ny
Jo abad thy wo mehal ab Hain Sony

Jagaji lagany ki duniya nahi ha
Ye ibrat ki jaan ha tamasha nahi ha

Mily khak main ahl e shaan kesy kesy 
Makeen ho gay laa makan kesy kesy 
Huwy naamwar ny nishaan kesy kesy 
Zameen kha gae noo jawan kesy kesy??
Yahi tujh ko dhun ha rahu San sy ala 
Ho zinat nirali ho fashion nirala
Jiya krta ha Kya yuhi mrny wala??
Tujy Husn e Zahir ny dhoky main dala 

Jagaji lagany ki duniya nahi ha
Ye ibrat ki jaan ha tamasha nahi ha
Qabar main mayat utarni ha zarur 

Jesi krni wesi bhrni ha zrur 
Dabdaba duniya main hi rah jay gaa 
Hussan tera khak main mill jay ga 
Bey namazi Teri shamat aye gii 
Qabar ki diwar mill hi Jay gii 
Toor Dy gi Qabar Teri pasliyan
Dono haton ki Mily Jo ungliyan
Landon or Pairas ky sapny chor Dy
Bsss Madiny sy hi rishty joor ly
Bey Wafa duniya py mt kar aitabar 
Tu achanak moot ka ho gaa shikar 
KR ly Toba Rab عزوجل ki rehmat ha Bari
Qabar main wrna saza ho gii Kari 

Tujy phly bachpan main barooo khilaya 
Jawani ny phir tujh ko majnu banaya 
Burhapy ny phir ahh!! Kya Kya sataya??
Ajal tera KR Dy gi bilkul safaya
Ajal ny naa chora kisra naa Dara 
Esi sy Sikandar sifataien bhi Hara
Har ak ha ky naa Kya Kya hasrat sadara 
Para rh gya sab yuhi thate Sara 

Jagaji lagany ki duniya nahi ha
Ye ibrat ki jaan ha tamasha nahi ha

Notice: 
Copy and reupload anything from our content is a crime and result can be given in legal way so be careful and avoid using our content anywhere.

#JagaJiLaganeKi #HafizTahirQadri #ShabeBaraat

snippet.title: बिना तले-बिना फटे ऐसी गुजिया जो पहले कभी ना आपने देखी होगी ना कभी खाई होगी | Shahi Gujiya Recipe
snippet.description:
बिना तले-बिना फटे ऐसी गुजिया जो पहले कभी ना आपने देखी होगी ना कभी खाई होगी | Shahi Gujiya Recipe

#HoliSoecial#ShahiGujiya#EasySweetRecipe

Ingredients:-

Milk Powder-1 cup
Milk-1/2 cup
Powder Sugar-3/4 cup
Ghee-2 tsp
Cardamom Powder-1/2 tsp
Coconut Powder-1/4 cup
Almonds-2 tbsp
Cashew Nuts-2 tbsp
Charoli-2 tbsp
Pistachio-2 tbsp

snippet.title: The Suicide Squad - Official Red Band Hindi Trailer
snippet.description:
From writer/director James Gunn comes Warner Bros. Pictures’ superhero action adventure “The Suicide Squad,” featuring a collection of the most degenerate delinquents in the DC lineup. Watch the Official Red Band Hindi Trailer now.

Website: www.warnerbros-india.com
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/WarnerBrosIndia​
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/warnerbrosindia
Twitter: https://twitter.com/warnerbrosindia

Welcome to hell—a.k.a. Belle Reve, the prison with the highest mortality rate in the US of A.  Where the worst Super-Villains are kept and where they will do anything to get out—even join the super-secret, super-shady Task Force X.  Today’s do-or-die assignment?  Assemble a collection of cons, including Bloodsport, Peacemaker, Captain Boomerang, Ratcatcher 2, Savant, King Shark, Blackguard, Javelin and everyone’s favorite psycho, Harley Quinn.  Then arm them heavily and drop them (literally) on the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Trekking through a jungle teeming with militant adversaries and guerrilla forces at every turn, the Squad is on a search-and-destroy mission with only Colonel Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave…and Amanda Waller’s government techies in their ears, tracking their every movement.  And as always, one wrong move and they’re dead (whether at the hands of their opponents, a teammate, or Waller herself).  If anyone’s laying down bets, the smart money is against them—all of them. 

The film stars Margot Robbie (“Birds of Prey,” “Bombshell”), Idris Elba (“Avengers: Infinity War”), John Cena (upcoming HBO Max series “Peacemaker,” “Bumblebee”), Joel Kinnaman (“Suicide Squad”), Jai Courtney (the “Divergent” franchise), Peter Capaldi (“World War Z,” BBC’s “Doctor Who” ), David Dastmalchian (upcoming “Dune,” “Ant-Man and the Wasp”), Daniela Melchior (“Parque Mayer”), Michael Rooker (the “Guardians of the Galaxy” films), Alice Braga (“Elysium”), Pete Davidson (“The King of Staten Island,” TV’s “Saturday Night Live”), Joaquín Cosio (“Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse,” TV’s “Narcos: Mexico”), Juan Diego Botto (“The Europeans”), Storm Reid (“The Invisible Man,” “A Wrinkle in Time”, “Euphoria”), Nathan Fillion (“Guardians of the Galaxy,” TV’s “The Rookie”), Steve Agee (“Brightburn,” “Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2”), Sean Gunn (the “Guardians of the Galaxy” films, the “Avengers” films), Mayling Ng (“Wonder Woman”), Flula Borg (“Ralph Breaks the Internet”), Jennifer Holland (“Brightburn,” upcoming HBO Max series “Peacemaker”) and Tinashe Kajese (TV’s “Valor,” “The Inspectors”), with Sylvester Stallone (the “Rocky,” “Rambo” and “Expendables” franchises), and Viola Davis (“Ma Rainey’s Black Bottom,” “Suicide Squad”).

Gunn (the “Guardian of the Galaxy” films) directs from his own screenplay, based on characters from DC.  The film is produced by Charles Roven and Peter Safran, with Zack Snyder, Deborah Snyder, Walter Hamada, Chantal Nong Vo, Nikolas Korda and Richard Suckle executive producing.

Gunn’s creative team includes director of photography Henry Braham (“Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2”), production designer Beth Mickle (“Captain Marvel”), editors Fred Raskin (“Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2,” “Once Upon a Time… In Hollywood”) and Christian Wagner (the “Fast & Furious” films) and Oscar-nominated costume designer Judianna Makovsky (“Guardians of the Galaxy Vol 2,” “Avengers: Endgame,” “Harry Potter and the Sorcerer’s Stone”).  The music is by John Murphy (“Kick-Ass”).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents An Atlas Entertainment/Peter Safran Production, A James Gunn Film, “The Suicide Squad.”  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It is set for release in cinemas in India in August 2021.

#WarnerBrosIndia​ #TheSuicideSquad​ #HindiTrailer

snippet.title: Bhide Ke Plan Par Pani Pher Diya! | Holi Special | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi
